title: Day 39 Lesson 1 - Video Repetition
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these sentences:

Sentence 1 - ホームページを　みても、わからないことが　あります。= After seeing your webpage, there was something I didn't understand.

Sentence 2 - ふじさんの　ツアーは　あめでも　ありますか。= If it rains, does the mountain tour still happen?

Sentence 3 - てんきが　わるくても　いきたいんですが…。= Even if the weather is bad, I still want to go.

How to use this lesson - When the repeat message shows and the video pauses, please repeat the sentence you have just heard. Keep practising until you can repeat perfectly!
